description: sf CLI vs sfdx deprecation — user asks which commands to use
input: My pipeline uses sfdx force:source:deploy and sfdx force:source:retrieve. Should I migrate to the new sf CLI? Are the old sfdx commands still supported?
expected_topics: sf project deploy start replaces sfdx force:source:deploy
sfdx commands are deprecated as of Spring 24
sf uses noun-verb-noun pattern
migration planning recommended before removal

description: 75% code coverage requirement — user asks why deployment failed despite 100% class coverage
input: I deployed a new Apex class with 100% test coverage and the deployment failed with INSUFFICIENT_CODE_COVERAGE. How is that possible?
expected_topics: 75% org-wide coverage required not just deployed class coverage
aggregate across all Apex in the org
new untested class can drop org-wide percentage
RunLocalTests runs all local tests
check ApexOrgWideCoverage

description: Scratch org shape does not capture data or manual config
input: I set up a scratch org definition file with all the right features. Why does my scratch org not have the permission set assignments and named credentials that my developer sandbox has?
expected_topics: project-scratch-def.json defines edition and features not data
permission set assignments not captured in scratch def
named credentials with credentials not captured
use sf data export to seed data separately
manual Setup configuration not captured

input: My CI pipeline fails with PACKAGE_DEPENDENCY_NOT_MET when installing my unlocked package. The package depends on another unlocked package. What is wrong?
expected_topics: dependencies must be installed before dependent packages
install dependency first then dependent
PACKAGE_DEPENDENCY_NOT_MET
packageAliases in sfdx-project.json
sf package install in dependency-resolved order

input: We ran a checkonly deployment that passed all tests. Can we deploy to production now without running all tests again? How does quick deploy work?
expected_topics: sf project deploy quick uses previously validated deployment ID
10-day window from checkonly run
tests do not re-run on quick deploy
store deployment ID from checkonly output
window expires after 10 days requiring full redeploy

description: Destructive changes XML required to delete components
input: I deleted an Apex class file from my source and deployed, but the class still exists in the org. How do I actually remove metadata from an org?
expected_topics: destructiveChanges.xml required to delete components from org
removing file from source tracking does not delete from org
destructiveChangesPost.xml for deletes after deployment
package.xml must accompany destructive changes
custom field deletion permanently removes data

description: Source tracking availability — not available in production
input: I am trying to use sf project deploy start to production and it says source tracking is not available. Why? How do I deploy to production without source tracking?
expected_topics: source tracking not available in production
specify --source-dir or --metadata or --manifest explicitly
source tracking only in scratch orgs and source-tracked sandboxes
Developer Edition and classic sandboxes do not support source tracking

description: Managed package namespace pollution — queries need namespaced field names
input: After installing a managed package, my SOQL queries that reference custom fields started failing. The error says field does not exist. The fields exist in Setup. What is happening?
expected_topics: managed package namespace prefix added to all component API names
fields become mypkg__FieldName__c after package install
SOQL queries must use namespaced API names
existing field FieldName__c and namespaced mypkg__FieldName__c are different fields
Flow and trigger references also need namespace update

description: Scratch org expiry is irreversible — cannot recover after expiration
input: My scratch org expired before I finished my feature. Can I recover the data and configuration from the expired scratch org?
expected_topics: scratch org permanently deleted after expiration
no recovery possible after expiry
use --duration-days to set longer expiry up to 30 days
use sandbox for long-running environments not scratch org
Dev Hub scratch org daily limit EXCEEDED_LIMIT

description: RunSpecifiedTests requires complete coverage for deployed components
input: I used RunSpecifiedTests with two test classes to speed up my production deployment, but it failed with INSUFFICIENT_CODE_COVERAGE even though those tests cover the classes I deployed. What am I missing?
expected_topics: RunSpecifiedTests only validates coverage from listed tests
all tests providing coverage for deployed components must be listed
omitting any covering test causes INSUFFICIENT_CODE_COVERAGE failure
RunLocalTests safer but slower alternative
maintaining test-to-component mapping is operationally expensive

description: Delta deployment in CI via git diff not source tracking
input: My Salesforce project has thousands of components. Deploying everything on every PR takes 45 minutes. How do I set up delta deployments in GitHub Actions?
expected_topics: no source tracking in CI for non-scratch org deployments
use git diff to derive changed components
sfdx-git-delta sgd automates delta manifest generation
sf sgd source delta --to HEAD --from base-branch
deploy using generated delta/package/package.xml manifest

description: Permission set XML incompleteness — retrieved files do not capture full permission picture
input: I retrieved a Permission Set from our UAT org and deployed it to a new sandbox, but many permissions are missing. The permission set looks different in Setup. Why?
expected_topics: retrieved permission set XML only includes explicitly set permissions
unset permissions are omitted from the XML
redeployed permission set does not recreate original fully
profiles are especially lossy in source format
full retrieval requires all component types in package.xml
